reviews.review_description: Easter event is cool, and was a great challenge! Weekly updates so far, so curious about what’s coming.
Fun to billd weird to drive/race

developer_response.body:
Thank you :) The demo game is currently in pre-launch development, so any feedback and comments are very helpful. 

We would appreciate it if you could share your feedback on this forum: 
https://forum.buildanddriveracing.com

Further updates will be released week by week, and I hope you enjoy the one coming tomorrow.
